abilities.name: psychic-surge
abilities.shortEffect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
abilities.flavorText: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

abilities.name: telepathy
abilities.shortEffect: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon does not take damage from friendly Pokémon's moves, including single-target moves aimed at it.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.
